description: Perform a purchase order and invoice reconciliation in WPS Spreadsheet using ~/Documents/PO_Reconciliation.xlsx. Create a 'Reconciliation' sheet that combines invoice data (InvoiceNo, Vendor, InvoiceDate, InvoiceAmount, PO_Reference) with calculated columns for PO_ExpectedAmount (referenced from the 'PurchaseOrders' sheet), Variance, VariancePct, and Status. The Status field must display 'REVIEW' for absolute variances greater than 5%, 'NO PO MATCH' for missing PO references, and 'OK' for others. Create a 'Summary' sheet reporting overall metrics for total, matched, and unmatched invoices, items needing review, and total sums for invoice amounts, expected amounts, and variances. This sheet must also include a Vendor Summary table listing invoice counts and financial totals per vendor. Apply professional formatting, including bold headers, currency symbols for dollar amounts, and red text for 'REVIEW' status indicators. Save the updated workbook to ~/Documents/PO_Reconciliation.xlsx.
